news.headline: Illinois American Water President calls for more investment in water infrastructure after ASCE report.
news.summary: The President of Illinois American Water, Rebecca Losli, has urged for a dedication to investing in water and wastewater infrastructure.

news.headline: Test drive the 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 at Solana Motors in Brady, Texas. Experience power and capability.
news.summary: Test drives of the new 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 are currently being offered at the Solana Motors dealership located in Brady, Texas. As of March 28, 2025, customers are invited to explore the features and performance of this model. The truck is specifically designed for robustness and is now on display for interested buyers in the Brady area to test out. This dealership in Texas serves as a platform for interested individuals to witness the power and capabilities of the 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 1500, with its durability and strength being highlighted during these test drives.

news.headline: OneCause gets 2 Silver Stevie Awards for customer service, recognized for the 8th year. March 28, 2025.
news.summary: An Indianapolis-based fundraising software company, OneCause, has been acknowledged for the eighth consecutive year for its exceptional service delivery. The company, known for its digital fundraising technology, recently received two Silver Stevie® Awards as part of the 2025 Stevie Awards for Sales & Customer Service. This recognition highlights the company's continued excellence in providing top-tier service.

news.headline: Inventor from Long Beach, Calif. creates BIRDIE BLOWER for sports enthusiasts; aims to offer refreshing breeze outdoors.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Long Beach, California, unveiled a new invention called the BIRDIE BLOWER. The product aims to provide a simple solution for enjoying a cool breeze during activities like golfing or watching sports in warm weather. The creator shared the inspiration behind the invention, highlighting a desire to offer a unique option for people seeking relief from the heat. The BIRDIE BLOWER is designed to enhance outdoor experiences and improve comfort for users.

news.headline: US ACaaS market worth $1.64 billion by 2029, with projected CAGR of 18.0% from 2024 to 2029.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of March 28, 2025, data reveals that the US market for access control as a service is anticipated to have a worth of $0.62 billion by the year 2023, with projections indicating a surge to $1.64 billion by 2029. The industry is forecasted to demonstrate a notable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 18.0% throughout the period extending from 2024 to 2029. These statistics showcase a promising trajectory for the sector in terms of expansion and revenue generation.

news.headline: Wang & Lee Group and City University of Hong Kong collaborate on Hong Kong's 1st smart flooring project to turn steps into clean energy.
news.summary: A groundbreaking collaboration has been established with City University of Hong Kong to promote sustainable urban solutions. This innovative partnership sets the stage for advancements in creating environmentally-friendly and efficient infrastructure in urban areas. The collaboration involves a significant investment of $2 million and aims to address pressing challenges faced by cities around the world. This joint effort is expected to lead to the development of cutting-edge technologies and strategies that will contribute to a more sustainable and resilient urban environment.

news.headline: New STIRLING ULT freezer has lowest ACT U.S. EIF score of 23, ranking it environmentally friendly as of March 2025.
news.summary: Stirling Ultracold's VAULT100™ upright freezer has been awarded an impressive U.S. Environmental Impact Factor (EIF) score of 23, standing as the lowest verified score among all ultra-low temperature (ULT) models currently featured in the ACT database. This achievement was announced on March 28, 2025, in ATHENS, Ohio. Stirling Ultracold continues to lead in innovation and sustainability within the industry.

Macatawa Bank sponsors ArtPrize Education Program, enhancing community engagement in Grand Rapids.
news.summary: Located in Grand Rapids, Michigan, Macatawa Bank, a Wintrust Community Bank, recently announced its sponsorship for ArtPrize 2025. This sponsorship signifies their support for the ArtPrize Education Program, showcasing their dedication to community engagement. As one of the pioneering sponsors for this event, Macatawa Bank underlines the importance of investing in the local community and promoting the arts. By joining as a sponsor, they are actively participating in fostering creativity and cultural enrichment.

news.headline: Visby Medical gains FDA approval for first-ever OTC PCR test for sexual health. Women's test authorized for OTC use.
news.summary: Today, in San Jose, California, Visby Medical™, a prominent medical diagnostics innovator, disclosed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has approved the De Novo authorization for the Visby Medical Women's Sexual Health Test for Over the Counter (OTC) use on March 28, 2025. This approval marks a significant milestone for Visby Medical™, indicating the company can now officially offer the Women's Sexual Health Test for commercial use without a prescription.

news.headline: Buy Bitcoin in Australia securely using various platforms and payment methods. Ownership surged from 23% in 2023 to 32.5% in 2025. Bitcoin is legal and regulated by AUSTRAC and ATO, with profits subject to CGT. Platforms must comply with AML and CTF regulations. Major platforms require AFSL for consumer protection. Use CoinSpot, Swyftx, or Binance for safe trading. Follow secure practices, like using non-custodial wallets and enabling 2FA. Bitcoin adoption is rising in Australia.
news.summary: Bitcoin is legal in Australia, regulated by AUSTRAC and ATO. Options to buy include exchanges, P2P, ATMs. Ownership rose from 23% in 2023 to 32.5% in 2025. Platforms like CoinSpot, Swyftx comply with regulations. AFSL required for major crypto platforms. For centralized exchange like CoinSpot, create account, add payment method, buy Bitcoin. For non-custodial wallet, like Trust Wallet, link payment, buy Bitcoin. DEX like Uniswap - create wallet, connect to DEX, buy Bitcoin. P2P platforms like Binance P2P - create account, search offers, conduct trade, receive Bitcoin. Bitcoin ATMs - find ATM, verify ID, buy Bitcoin. Bitcoin ETFs - open brokerage account, complete KYC, deposit funds, search ETF, buy. Best practices - store securely, use reliable platforms, secure internet, use cold wallets. Stay updated on trends, tax obligations, and regulations for better investment decisions and compliance with Australian laws.

news.headline: Bitcoin drops to $85K, altcoins slide ahead of inflation data. Trump's tariffs may raise $800B. Galaxy Digital settles for $200M.
news.summary: Galaxy Digital has agreed to pay a settlement of $200 million with the New York Attorney General in relation to Terra-LUNA. Bitcoin's value has dropped to $85,000, while Ethereum and XRP have slid by 5% prior to key inflation data. Trump's SEC pick Paul Atkins plans to focus on rational crypto regulations. Peter Schiff criticizes Gamestop's Bitcoin strategy as shares plummet. Shiba Inu is attracting more holders than Bitcoin and Ethereum, despite high whale concentration. Bitcoin options worth over $12 billion are set to expire, hinting at potential market volatility. Crypto.Com, a Trump media partner, has announced an end to SEC enforcement actions, leading to a 12% surge in its native token's value. Meanwhile, Bitcoin, Ethereum are stable, while Dogecoin dips amid Trump tariffs-fueled uncertainty. In US markets, Merit Medical Systems analyst has initiated bullish coverage, with analysts predicting lower openings and cautioning about potential harm to both US and global risk assets due to prolonged uncertainty. Dow Jones has dipped 150 points following Trump's auto tariffs. US politics focus on Trump's tariffs possibly generating $800 billion over the next decade. Trump Organization makes investments. Detailed coverage can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Valoe delays 2024 financial statement release.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.2%, marking an increase of 0.4% from the previous month. The number of individuals currently unemployed is approximately 1.2 million. Additionally, the report showed that the economy added only 150,000 new jobs in the last quarter, falling short of the projected 200,000 jobs. These numbers highlight the challenges the labor market is facing amid the ongoing economic uncertainty.

news.headline: Consumer inflation expectations hit 4.1% in March, highest in 32 years, with 5% for the next 12 months. Consumer sentiment sinks to 57.0, weakest since November 2022.
news.summary: Investors were initially concerned after the preliminary reading, but the final report from the University of Michigan revealed even more troubling data. In March, five-year ahead inflation expectations for American consumers surged to 4.1%, surpassing the earlier estimate of 3.9% and reaching the highest level since February 1993. Short-term inflation concerns for the next year also increased from 4.9% to 5%, the highest recorded since July 2022. This surge in inflation expectations was accompanied by a decline in consumer sentiment, with the University of Michigan's index dropping to 57.0 in March from the initial 57.9 and a steep fall from February's 64.7. This represents the lowest consumer sentiment reading since November 2022.

Krispy Krunchy Chicken becomes Official Fried Chicken of Boston Red Sox; available at Fenway Park with 3200 locations nationally.
news.summary: Atlanta - Krispy Krunchy Chicken® has been selected as the Official Fried Chicken of the Boston Red Sox, marking a significant partnership for the fast-growing food concept. With a presence in 3200 convenience stores nationwide, the brand will showcase its signature fresh, hand-breaded chicken tenders and krispy chicken sandwich at Fenway Park. This collaboration will bring Krispy Krunchy Chicken® to the oldest Major League Base, Fenway Park, delighting Red Sox fans with its popular offerings.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Udemy (Nasdaq: UDMY), a prominent online skills marketplace, was recently recognized as a Strategic Leader in the 2025 Fosway 9-Grid™ for Digital Learning. Fosway highlighted that Strategic Leaders, like Udemy, stand out for providing advanced solutions tailored to intricate enterprise requirements, thereby achieving great product-market alignment and customer advocacy. This acknowledgment underscores Udemy's notable achievements in the field.

news.headline: Inventor creates Wadu Tub for Muslims in California, aiming to enhance safety and religious significance during wudu.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, a resident of Aliso Viejo, California, shared plans to introduce a new tub for wudu preparation and purification, aimed at enhancing safety and religious value for Muslims. news.headline: Michael Baker International hires 3 new staff: IDA Market Director & VP for Southwestern & Northwestern U.S., Business Development Executive & VP for Private Sector Clients.
news.summary: A company has introduced Edward (Ed) Hanbicki, AIA, NCARB, LEED BD&C, as the Market Director and Vice President for the Southwestern and Northwestern regions of the United States. Additionally, Ford Hubbard has been appointed as the Business Development Executive and Vice President for Private Sector Clients, specifically concentrating on Texas and the Southeastern U.S. Keep reading to know more about the new hires and their roles within the company.

news.headline: Cathie Wood stands firm on $2,600 Tesla stock prediction, expecting 10x surge by 2030 despite 32% YTD decline in 2025.
news.summary: Cathie Wood, CEO of Ark Invest, has maintained her optimistic price target of $2,600 for Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) despite the stock's 32% decrease in value so far in 2025. Wood anticipates a significant 10-fold increase in Tesla's stock price, projecting it to reach $2,600 per share by 2030. This outlook was expressed during an interview with Bloomberg TV on Monday. Wood cited the contributing factor to this surge as Tesla's robotaxi segment, which she believes will make up 90% of the company's market share. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
